error.message: Judge score comment_usefulness must be an integer in 0..3

abstraction_and_responsibility.reason: Game state and objects are encapsulated in classes, but some logic like win condition, AI update, and event handling remain in monolithic Game.run() instead of further abstractions.

changeability_and_testability.reason: Game logic is spread across a single class, making it hard to test components like collision detection or AI independently without running the full game loop. Ball.speed_multiplier and speed recalculation logic (lines 88-90) is error-prone to changes.

comment_usefulness.reason: All comments restate code literally (e.g., '# 边界检查', '# 更新位置') or document obvious logic without adding insight; none explain why or how architectural decisions were made.

semantic_readability.reason: Method and variable names are clear, but constants like UP/DOWN direction values are defined separately (lines 15-16) yet used unconnectedly in Paddle.direction (line 31). The win condition logic combines both score and time checks without clear separation, making intent harder to follow.
